name: formatString
description: String interpolation with ${/path} syntax. Replaces ${/data/model/path} placeholders in a template string with values resolved from the data model. For example, the template 'Hello, ${/user/name}!' resolves the value at /user/name in the data model and substitutes it in place. Non-path expressions (without a leading '/') are left unchanged.

template.description: Template string containing ${/data/model/path} placeholders to interpolate.

targetPath.description: Optional data model path to write the interpolated result to.
